figures.caption: Figure 1: PAINT training pipeline. PAINT samples an on-policy rollout, uses rollout-reference overlap α to form a suffix-masked solution ỹ⋆, re-scores the same prefixes with a fixed privileged view, and applies small energy interpolation only on entropy-mismatch positions.

Figure 2: Prompt views for privileged re-scoring. The fixed teacher sees a masked reference solution and scores the same student-produced prefixes, yielding token-level targets without generating a separate trajectory.
